events.title: The missing mitten
events.text: A favourite mitten vanishes somewhere between home and the street.

choices.label: Search everywhere
choices.outcome: You search patiently and find it tucked behind a bench.

choices.label: Accept a replacement
choices.outcome: You choose a new pair and decide the mystery can remain unsolved.

events.title: A secret club
events.text: A few children invite you to join a club with a very serious password.

choices.label: Join the club
choices.outcome: You memorise the password and spend the afternoon inventing rules.

choices.label: Do your own thing
choices.outcome: You politely decline and enjoy a quiet afternoon instead.

events.title: A project with glitter everywhere
events.text: Your class starts a project that somehow covers every surface in glitter.

choices.label: Make a careful project
choices.outcome: Your project is tidy, detailed, and surprisingly glitter-resistant.

choices.label: Use absolutely all the glitter
choices.outcome: The result is chaotic, bright, and impossible to ignore.

events.title: Your first independent trip
events.text: You are trusted to travel across town without an adult.

choices.label: Plan the route carefully
choices.outcome: You arrive on time and feel more independent than before.

choices.label: Explore as you go
choices.outcome: You take a wrong turn, discover a new place, and still make it home.

events.title: Something you made gets noticed
events.text: A small creative project you shared online begins receiving kind comments.

choices.label: Keep creating
choices.outcome: You keep improving it and gain confidence in your own ideas.

choices.label: Keep future work private
choices.outcome: You appreciate the attention but decide to create for yourself.

events.title: A difficult week of exams
events.text: Several deadlines arrive at once and everyone seems tense.

choices.label: Make a study schedule
choices.outcome: The plan helps you finish the week feeling prepared.

choices.label: Protect your sleep
choices.outcome: You rest properly and handle the exams with a clearer head.

events.title: A possible roommate
events.text: Someone offers to split housing costs and share a home.

choices.label: Try living together
choices.outcome: The arrangement saves money and adds new routines to your life.

choices.label: Keep your own space
choices.outcome: You decide that privacy is worth the extra expense.

events.title: A neighbour needs a hand
events.text: A neighbour asks for help carrying groceries and fixing a small household problem.

choices.label: Help them
choices.outcome: The task takes an hour and turns into a warm conversation.

choices.label: Apologise and decline
choices.outcome: You are honest that you do not have the energy today.

events.title: An unexpected refund
events.text: A company corrects an old billing error and sends money back to you.

choices.label: Save it
choices.outcome: You place the refund safely into your balance.

choices.label: Use it for something cheerful
choices.outcome: You spend part of it on a pleasant day out.

events.title: An old acquaintance writes
events.text: Someone from an earlier chapter of your life sends a thoughtful message.

choices.label: Write back
choices.outcome: The conversation feels easy despite the years between you.

choices.label: Leave the past where it is
choices.outcome: You appreciate the message but choose not to reopen that chapter.

events.title: A local showcase
events.text: A community event invites people to share hobbies, collections, and personal projects.

choices.label: Share something you made
choices.outcome: People respond warmly and you leave with fresh motivation.

choices.label: Attend as a visitor
choices.outcome: You spend the afternoon discovering what other people create.

events.title: A recipe worth preserving
events.text: A family recipe is nearly forgotten and someone asks you to write it down.

choices.label: Learn it properly
choices.outcome: You practise until the recipe feels like part of your own memory.

choices.label: Write down the instructions
choices.outcome: You preserve the recipe carefully for a future generation.

events.title: A room that no longer fits your life
events.text: You notice that part of your home still belongs to an older version of you.

choices.label: Redesign the space
choices.outcome: The room begins to feel useful and welcoming again.

choices.label: Keep it as it is
choices.outcome: You decide the old room can remain a quiet archive.

events.title: Someone asks for your guidance
events.text: A younger person asks how you handled a difficult part of your path.

choices.label: Give honest advice
choices.outcome: You share both the mistakes and the parts that worked.

choices.label: Focus on encouragement
choices.outcome: You help them leave the conversation believing in their own choices.

events.title: A box of old letters
events.text: A box contains messages, photographs, and small reminders of earlier years.

choices.label: Read through everything
choices.outcome: The afternoon becomes a gentle journey through old memories.

choices.label: Share them with family
choices.outcome: The stories become part of the family’s shared history.

events.title: A quiet community honour
events.text: People in your community thank you for the years you have spent contributing.

choices.label: Accept with gratitude
choices.outcome: The recognition feels meaningful because it comes from people who know you.

choices.label: Thank the whole group instead
choices.outcome: You use the moment to recognise everyone who helped along the way.

events.title: A beginner again
events.text: You find a skill you never had time to learn before.

choices.label: Start from the beginning
choices.outcome: Being a beginner feels refreshing rather than embarrassing.

choices.label: Watch and appreciate
choices.outcome: You enjoy seeing other people practise their craft.

events.title: A long evening without power
events.text: A storm causes a power cut and the usual distractions disappear.

choices.label: Tell stories together
choices.outcome: The dark room fills with stories and laughter.

choices.label: Enjoy the quiet
choices.outcome: You listen to the weather and let the evening slow down.

events.title: The first snow of the season
events.text: The world outside changes overnight under a layer of snow.

choices.label: Go outside
choices.outcome: The cold air and bright landscape make the day memorable.

choices.label: Watch from somewhere warm
choices.outcome: You stay warm and enjoy the view from indoors.
